topics.title: American Idol Voting Controversies
topics.summary: The studio discusses the voting process and perceived irregularities regarding contestant Sanjaya, while also debating the performances of other contestants like Lakeisha and a beatboxer.

topics.title: American Idol and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The studio discusses the reality of American Idol contestants, personal opinions on celebrity figures like Paris Hilton, and the complexities of Howard Stern’s upcoming marriage and views on parenthood.

topics.title: Radio Show Production Tensions
topics.summary: The studio explores the internal dynamics of the show, addressing recent outbursts over production errors and the impact of personal life changes on the host's temperament.

topics.title: Riley Martin and Musical Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses Riley Martin's contract negotiations and upcoming show while hosting musicians Tommy Shaw and Jack Blades to perform cover songs.

topics.title: Shawblades Musical Performance and Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts the band Shawblades to discuss their new album, perform live covers of songs by Yes and others, and share stories about life on the road.

topics.title: Lily Tomlin Film Set Outburst
topics.summary: The show features a clip of actress Lily Tomlin and director David O. Russell during a tense filming session where the director loses his temper over script changes.

topics.title: Suzanne Portnoy's Sexual Experiences and Memoir
topics.summary: The studio hosts Suzanne Portnoy as she discusses her transition from a suburban housewife to an active participant in the swinging scene and glory hole culture, which inspired her memoir.

topics.title: Suzanne Portnoy Book Promotion and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with author Suzanne Portnoy regarding her book, followed by segments on celebrity news involving David Letterman, Michael Richards, and Simon Cowell.

topics.title: Music Industry Copyright Disputes
topics.summary: The studio explores various instances of musical plagiarism and legal settlements involving artists like Led Zeppelin, George Harrison, and the Ronettes.

topics.title: Led Zeppelin and Angie Model Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the origins of Led Zeppelin's musical influences, the personal history between Howard Stern and model Angie, and a brief interview with tennis player Martina Navratilova.

topics.title: Angie Eberhart Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with actress Angie Eberhart regarding her past relationship with Howard Stern, her upcoming film "The Unknown Trilogy," and her transition into a stable marriage.

topics.title: Angie Everhart Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with model Angie Everhart regarding her upcoming film with Joe Pesci and her experiences in the entertainment industry.

topics.title: American Idol Voting and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the integrity of American Idol voting results for contestant Sanjaya, reports on Jenna Jameson's public statement regarding her weight and divorce, and reviews various news segments including a local search for Beetlejuice.

topics.title: Rhode Island Child Neglect Case and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show covers a Rhode Island couple's legal situation regarding child neglect, discusses the career of Robin Thicke, addresses reports on Dina Lohan, and features various listener interactions.

topics.title: Media Confrontations and Political News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a heated exchange between Rosie O'Donnell and Elizabeth Hasselbeck regarding prisoner treatment, updates on television hosting roles, and various news reports including Iraq security, federal investigations, and the recovery of a lost scout.

topics.title: Grand Canyon Skywalk and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the construction of a new skywalk at the Grand Canyon, celebrity rumors involving Paris Hilton and Heather Mills, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
